words.meaning_en: A large group of musicians who play together
words.example_sentence: The orchestra played beautiful classical music.

words.meaning_en: A person you like and enjoy spending time with
words.example_sentence: My best friend and I sit together in class.

words.meaning_en: A person who lives next to or near you
words.example_sentence: Our neighbour helped us during the flood.

words.meaning_en: Something given to someone as a present
words.example_sentence: She received a gift on her birthday.

words.meaning_en: A written or spoken request to attend an event
words.example_sentence: He sent an invitation to all his friends.

words.meaning_en: A celebration or holiday observed by a community
words.example_sentence: Diwali is a popular festival of lights.

words.meaning_en: A strong belief in someone's honesty and reliability
words.example_sentence: Good friendships are built on trust.

words.meaning_en: An angry argument or disagreement between people
words.example_sentence: The two boys had a quarrel over the ball.

words.meaning_en: To give part of something to others
words.example_sentence: Good friends always share their things.

words.meaning_en: To do something special to mark a happy occasion
words.example_sentence: We celebrate birthdays with cake and songs.

words.meaning_en: To say hello or welcome someone
words.example_sentence: She greeted her friend with a wave.
They sat gossiping about their neighbors.

words.meaning_en: A person you spend time with or travel with
words.example_sentence: The dog was his faithful companion.
